failures.description: The Researcher made an invalid ProductCatalogSearch invocation by passing {"product_id": 0} instead of the required string item_id and product_id values.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was clear: use ProductCatalogSearch with item_id 1096508426 and product_id 1808611083 to determine whether the puzzle difficulty level is beginner. At index 2, the agent attempted a concrete tool call with malformed arguments: it omitted the required item_id and changed product_id to numeric 0 instead of the provided string. The tool later explicitly returned a SchemaError saying string product_id and item_id are required. This is not a connectivity, access, or guardrail issue.
